expectations.text: Script contains a model create command
A rigid body part is created with part create rigid_body
expectations.evidence: Found: 'part create rigid_body name_and_position  part_name = .PENDULUM.LINK' and a second 'part create rigid_body mass_properties' for mass/inertia properties

expectations.text: At least one marker is created on the link and at least one on ground
expectations.evidence: Ground marker: 'marker create marker_name = .PENDULUM.ground.M_PIVOT'. Link markers: M_PIN, M_CM, M_TIP, and M_ROD_VIS all created with 'marker create marker_name = .PENDULUM.LINK.*'

expectations.text: A revolute joint is created using constraint create joint revolute with i_marker_name and j_marker_name
expectations.evidence: Found: 'constraint create joint revolute  joint_name = .PENDULUM.REV_PIVOT  i_marker_name = .PENDULUM.LINK.M_PIN  j_marker_name = .PENDULUM.ground.M_PIVOT'

expectations.text: A gravity field is created with gravity_field_name and a negative Y component
expectations.evidence: Found: 'forces create body_force gravity_field  gravity_field_name = .PENDULUM.GRAVITY  y_component_gravity = -9806.65'

expectations.text: Initial orientation is set to 45 degrees (or 45D)
expectations.evidence: Found: 'part modify rigid_body name_and_position  part_name = .PENDULUM.LINK  orientation = 0.0D, 0.0D, 45.0D'

expectations.text: All keywords are spelled out in full (no abbreviated forms like PART or CONST)
expectations.evidence: All commands use fully spelled keywords: 'model create', 'defaults units', 'forces create body_force gravity_field', 'marker create', 'part create rigid_body', 'constraint create joint revolute', 'part modify rigid_body', 'geometry create shape sphere/cylinder'. No abbreviated forms found.
All object names use dot-path hierarchy: .PENDULUM.GRAVITY, .PENDULUM.LINK, .PENDULUM.ground.M_PIVOT, .PENDULUM.LINK.M_PIN, .PENDULUM.LINK.M_CM, .PENDULUM.LINK.M_TIP, .PENDULUM.REV_PIVOT, etc.
